title: notocles indica
intro: Notocles indica, also known as Ashwagandha, is a plant-based adaptogen that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It is defined as a shrub native to India and other parts of Asia, characterized by its green leaves and yellow flowers. Ashwagandha has been found to possess medicinal properties that reduce inflammation, improve sleep, and alleviate stress and anxiety. The health benefits of Ashwagandha include enhanced cognitive function, improved cardiovascular health, and immune system support, and it can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder through various herbal preparations.
